pageContext.name: Blue Mary
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Storm Collectibles are proud to present the Blue Mary Action Figure from The King of Fighters '98: Ultimate Match!  Blue Mary, she currently works as a freelance special agent. Born from a long line of famous fighters, Blue Mary excels in all fighting styles, and more particularly, in the Sambo Commando, a martial that uses striking and grappling techniques. Blue Mary has a strong bond with Terry Bogard.
